prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical full-body fashion portrait of a beautiful young woman with long dark brown wavy hair walking toward the camera in an elegant luxury hotel lobby. She has fair skin and soft, polished styling, with her face intentionally anonymized by a smooth vertical blur over the facial features while keeping the hair shape and pose realistic. She wears a dark indigo denim off-shoulder jumpsuit with exactly two layered ruffle tiers across the neckline, short off-shoulder sleeves, wide-leg pants, and a matching denim fabric belt tied at the waist with one long hanging end. Add delicate accessories: exactly five visible pieces, consisting of two medium silver hoop earrings, one fine necklace with a small pendant, one slim bracelet on the left wrist, and one gold watch on the right wrist. Her right hand holds a small black clutch purse, and her left arm hangs naturally as she walks. The setting is a warm cream-and-gold upscale interior with polished marble floors, soft beige walls, blurred dark wood furniture, table lamps, floral decor, and exactly two visible crystal chandeliers, one large blurred chandelier in the upper left and one sparkling chandelier in the upper right. Use shallow depth of field, warm ambient lighting, soft bokeh highlights, realistic fabric texture, natural body proportions, and a centered runway-like composition. Shot at eye level with a medium telephoto lens look, vertical 4:5 framing, high-end editorial fashion photography, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
